name: Buttermilk Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar, salt, yeast, baking soda, and cinnamon.
2. In a smaller bowl, measure out 5 to 5 1/2 cups bromated "better bread" flour.
3. Add 1 1/2 cups of the flour to the dry ingredients in the large bowl. Blend until well mixed.
4. Pour melted butter, lightly beaten eggs, and buttermilk into the dry ingredients. Beat at high speed for two minutes.
5. Gradually add an additional 1 1/2 cups of flour to the mixture. Continue beating for another two minutes.
6. Turn dough out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic (about 5-7 minutes).
7. Shape the dough into greased loaf pans and let rise for one hour.
8. Punch down the dough, shape into loaves, and place back in the greased pans.
9. Let rise for an additional 1 hour.
10. Preheat oven to 375°F. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped.
11. Bakes two medium-sized loaves.
